scenario: Married filing jointly with W-2s ($42k + $28k), taxpayer has 401k deferral $7,000 — Saver's Credit at 10% rate (AGI $50,001–$76,500 MFJ)
source: IRS VITA Pub 4491 TY2025, illustrative case — Saver's Credit module (Form 8880); IRC §25B; 10% rate MFJ AGI $50,001–$76,500; Rev. Proc. 2024-40 §3.43
